reg_env
uvm_env
reg_env #( type SEQ_ITEM = uvm_sequence_item, type ADAPTER = uvm_reg_adapter, type REG_BLOCK= uvm_reg_block )

Typed register environment containing a sequence item, predictor, and register block.  The goal is to avoid some of the boilerplate code in case of another UVM environment; The thing is that EVERY SINGLE register environment needs this, so it's entirely reusable.

Variables
ral
REG_BLOCK ral

The typed register model for the specific device.

adapter
ADAPTER adapter

The typed register adapter used by the register model and predictor.

predictor
uvm_reg_predictor #(
SEQ_ITEM
) predictor

The register predictor that converts bus transactions into register predictions.

Functions
build_phase
virtual function void build_phase(
uvm_phase 
phase
)

Constructs the adapter, register block, and the predictor. Also locks the RAL and sets the auto predict to 0, since the RAL will be set via subscriber instead of auto prediction.

connect_phase
virtual function void connect_phase(
uvm_phase 
phase
)

Connects RAL and adapter to the predictor. Client env still has to connect bus monitor to predictor.
